beats.narration: The shot ends; steel remembers. Retentivity is the field it keeps; coercive force, the fight to remove it. Hardened steel fights hardest.

payload.title: STEEL REMEMBERS
payload.sub: Find the leftover field, erase it, and prove it's gone.

beats.narration: Longitudinal residual fields leave poles a meter can see. Circular residuals hide inside: the meter reads zero. Critical procedures convert them to longitudinal first.

payload.heading: Longitudinal shows. Circular hides.
payload.note: READS ZERO — CONVERT TO LONGITUDINAL FIRST

beats.narration: Erase it: reverse the field as it shrinks to zero. A C hugs the surface; deep direct current fields need reversing, step-down D C.

payload.heading: Reach the depth where the field lives
payload.note: AC HUGS THE SURFACE · DEEP FIELD → REVERSING DC

beats.narration: Demagnetization isn't done until it's measured: indicator at ends, corners, and section changes. Three gauss or less is common — your procedure governs.
So the rule: expose the hidden field, erase it, measure it. And never trust a zero reading on a head-shot part.

payload.sub: Never trust zero on a head-shot part.
